name: Churu Bites Dog Treats Chicken Recipe Wraps Salmon Recipe
description: Churu Bites Dog Treats – Chicken Wraps with Salmon are soft-baked, grain-free dog treats designed to delight dogs of all sizes and ages. Each bite features a soft baked chicken exterior wrapped around a creamy salmon Churu filling , offering two textures in one treat for a satisfying and tasty experience. Crafted with premium, human-grade ingredients , including farm-raised chicken, wild-caught tuna, and Pacific salmon, Churu Bites are naturally flavorful, highly palatable, and free from grains, preservatives, artificial colors, carrageenan, and by-products. With over 70% moisture and approximately 16 kcal per bite , these treats are low-calorie and hydrating perfect for rewarding, training, or simply showing your dog some extra love. Enriched with Vitamin E for immune support and Green Tea Extract as a natural antioxidant, Churu Bites do more than taste great—they also support your dog’s overall wellbeing. Individually wrapped for freshness and portion control, these treats are convenient for on-the-go snacking or hiding medication for finicky dogs. Whether for training, rewarding, or pampering , Churu Bites Chicken Wraps with Salmon provide a wholesome, nutritious, and indulgent snack your dog will adore. Key Benefits Dual texture: soft baked chicken outside, creamy salmon Churu filling inside Grain-free and free from artificial additives Low-calorie and high moisture for healthy snacking Enriched with Vitamin E and Green Tea Extract Made with human-grade, premium ingredients (chicken, tuna, salmon) Perfect for picky eaters, training, medication, or older/small dogs Nutritional Highlights (per bite) Crude Protein: 22% min Crude Fat: 3% min Crude Fiber: 0.5% max Moisture: 72% max Vitamin E: 80 IU/kg min Feeding Instructions Serve as a treat only, not a substitute for meals Provide fresh water with each treat Refrigerate after opening to maintain freshness Ideal for training rewards or hiding pills
